title: Bottom CTA

fields.label: Heading
fields.name: section_heading
fields.instructions: H2 heading. Example: "Let's figure out what your platform needs."
fields.default_value: Let’s figure out what your platform needs.
fields.placeholder: Let’s figure out what your platform needs.

fields.label: Description
fields.name: section_description
fields.instructions: Supporting paragraph beneath the heading. 2–3 sentences.
fields.default_value: Book a free 30-minute strategy session. We will review your current site, discuss your goals and tell you plainly what we think the right next step is.

fields.label: Trust Line
fields.name: trust_line
fields.instructions: Short bold reassurance line below the description. Example: "No obligation. We respond within one business day."
fields.default_value: No obligation. We respond within one business day.
fields.placeholder: No obligation. We respond within one business day.

fields.label: Primary CTA
fields.name: cta_primary
fields.instructions: Coral button — main call to action.

description: Fields for the Bottom CTA block.
